---
title: "Release Timeline"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

## Available Versions

The table below is generated from GitHub Releases.

<div id="release-table">Loading release data...</div>

<script>
(async () => {
  const endpoint = "https://api.github.com/repos/IPBES-Data/IPBES_Data_Vision/releases";
  const container = document.getElementById("release-table");

  const doiRegex = /10\.\d{4,9}\/[-._;()/:A-Z0-9]+/i;

  const render = (rows) => {
    if (!rows.length) {
      container.innerHTML = "No releases found yet.";
      return;
    }

    const header = "<table><thead><tr><th>Version</th><th>Date</th><th>DOI</th><th>Release</th><th>PDF</th></tr></thead><tbody>";
    const body = rows.map((r) => {
      const doiCell = r.doi ? `<a href=\"https://doi.org/${r.doi}\">${r.doi}</a>` : "PENDING";
      const pdfCell = r.pdf ? `<a href=\"${r.pdf}\">PDF</a>` : "-";
      return `<tr><td>${r.tag}</td><td>${r.date}</td><td>${doiCell}</td><td><a href=\"${r.url}\">Release</a></td><td>${pdfCell}</td></tr>`;
    }).join("");

    container.innerHTML = `${header}${body}</tbody></table>`;
  };

  try {
    const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
      headers: { "Accept": "application/vnd.github+json" }
    });
    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);

    const releases = await response.json();
    const rows = releases
      .filter((r) => !r.draft)
      .map((r) => {
        const body = r.body || "";
        const doiMatch = body.match(doiRegex);
        const pdfAsset = (r.assets || []).find((a) => a.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(".pdf"));

        return {
          tag: r.tag_name,
          date: (r.published_at || "").slice(0, 10),
          doi: doiMatch ? doiMatch[0] : "",
          url: r.html_url,
          pdf: pdfAsset ? pdfAsset.browser_download_url : ""
        };
      });

    render(rows);
  } catch (error) {
    container.textContent = "Could not load release data from GitHub Releases.";
    console.error(error);
  }
})();
</script>
